title: Transfection of Constructs in Diplonemids to Block NHEJ Pathway
author: Binnypreet Kaur1
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x35fqq6

steps.title: Step 0
steps.instruction: Step 0: Pre-incubation of Diplonema cells for 4 hours with W7 (5 mg/ml) beforeelectroporation. EC value of W7 was calculated by Alamar blue assay

steps.title: Count the cells and plan to...
steps.instruction: Count the cells and plan to 1 nucleofection with 5x 10 7 cells for each construct.

steps.title: Resuspendthe cell pellet in 100ul of...
steps.instruction: Resuspendthe cell pellet in 100ul of AMAXA Human T- cell solution at 4C (from refrigerator combine 81.8ul of Human T-cell nucleofectorsolution + 18.2ul Supplement).

steps.title: Harvest thecells by centrifugation at 1300xg...
steps.instruction: Harvest thecells by centrifugation at 1300xg for 5 min at room temperature in Swing BucketRotor

steps.title: Add 5-10ug of (PCR) (linearized DNA)...
steps.instruction: Add 5-10ug of (PCR) (linearized DNA) into the cuvette(resuspend in 10ul of H2O).

steps.title: : Put everything into the cuvette,...
steps.instruction: : Put everything into the cuvette, close the cap and place in the electroporator, cuvette should only fit in one direction, but metal sides should face towards you.

steps.title: Press for the Program X-001 to electroporate
steps.instruction: Press for the Program X-001 to electroporate.

steps.title: Transfer the entire cell- DNA transfectant...
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire cell- DNA transfectant into 10ml of Diplonema media (chloramphenicol) with the supplied disposable micropipettes

steps.title: Immediately observe the flasks containing transfectants...
steps.instruction: Immediately observe the flasks containing transfectants under a microscopeand place them in the incubator at 27C + shaker and let them grow for 6-8h.

steps.title: After 6-8 hours took out the...
steps.instruction: After 6-8 hours took out the flasks and make controls which should be without antibiotics - put 1ml of the electroporated cells in the first well of 24 well plates.

steps.title: In the rest - 9ml -transfectants...
steps.instruction: In the rest - 9ml -transfectants add Puromycin antibiotics in the flasks.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5ml of electroporated cells in the first row(6 wells) of 24 well plates. Put 900ul of the media (+ selectable drug) in the rest of the wells. Take 100ul from first well and transfer to the next to make 10x serial dilution and so on...up to the lowest concentration 5 x 10 2 cells/ml and let them grow untill selection of clones is done.

steps.title: Result
steps.instruction: Result: Unfortunately, targeting to the planned position (N-terminal tagging of alpha-tubulin with mCherry under puromycin R selection) did not work in any of the obtained clones.
